request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech puts national security at risk. The recent cyber attacks on our infrastructure prove we can't afford to wait. Strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-reliant—it's about protecting our families and communities. We've built our lives on the promise of safety; let's not gamble that away for short-term convenience. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
